name: Ziti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta for the specified time, reducing by 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, sauté beef and onions until beef is well browned. Use two large skillets or brown in batches.
3. Add mushrooms and garlic; cook for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Drain ziti.
5. Combine meat mixture, sauce, wine, oregano, salt, and pepper.
6. Add drained ziti and mix thoroughly.
7. Pour the mixture into two greased baking dishes (13 x 9 inches) and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
10. Serve with sour cream. Makes 8 servings.
